coverages_discussed.notes: Current 2024 policy carrier; total TIV across 9 locations is $251,345,000.

positives: 8 out of 9 locations are fully sprinklered.
Predominantly Non-Combustible, Masonry Non-Combustible, or Fire Resistive construction.
Most recent policy years (2022, 2023, 2024) have zero claims reported.
concerns: Location 7 (Toledo Industrial Park - Building 2) is manufacturing occupancy and lacks a sprinkler system.
risk_highlights.loss_history_summary: Total of 2 property claims with $202,875 paid and $238,554 total incurred.

extracted_text_sections.claims_narrative: Property loss summary indicates 2 claims with a total paid amount of $202,875 and a total incurred amount of $238,554. Only 1 claim occurred in the 2021 policy period with Hartford Financial Services; the 2022-2024 policy years show 0 claims.
